title: Thelypteris wuyishanica

The species is native to China and is considered a rare and endangered plant. Thelypteris wuyishanica is a type of deciduous fern that grows in shaded areas and is typically found in moist, humid environments. Its classification is further supported by its membership in the subfamily Thelypteridoideae.
